Package io.forja.components.utilities.fxPortal

Class FxPortal

java.lang.Object
io.forja.components.utilities.fxPortal.FxPortal
public class FxPortal extends Object
A "render-elsewhere" helper — attaches a target node to the OverlayHost overlay layer of a given Scene whenever isVisible() is true, and removes it when false.

Useful for lightbox, dropdown-menu, or popup content that logically belongs to a component but should render on top of the whole scene.

Builder usage:

     
      FxPortal portal = FxPortal.builder()
          .scene(scene)
          .node(mySnackbar)
          .position(Pos.BOTTOM_CENTER)
          .visible(true)
          .build();
      // later
      portal.setVisible(false); // detaches from overlay
See Also:
  • OverlayHost
  • FxPortal.Builder
